prompt_text:
### Demographics: 43-year-old Asian man

### Visit type: Follow-up visit (12-month follow-up)

### Reason for visit / current symptoms
Reason for visit: Routine follow-up (every 3 months) | Diagnosis context: 7 years ago Diagnosed with type 2 diabetes after hyperglycemia symptoms (polyuria, polydipsia, weight loss)
Current symptoms: Occasional fatigue and thirst with nocturia; no DKA/HHS signs; no severe hypoglycemia

### History
- Other conditions: Chronic kidney disease Stage 3a (45-59)
Body mass index category: Obese Class II
Major Depressive Disorder
Appendicitis (status post appendectomy)
- Diabetes-related comorbidities: CKD: Stage 3a (45-59); HF (No); ASCVD (No); MASLD: Normal; BMI Category: Obese Class II
- Family history: Type 2 diabetes (older sister)
- Social history: Former smoker (quit 10 years ago; 10 cigarettes/day for 20 years; ~10 pack-years); Alcohol 5-6 drinks/week (1-2 per sitting)

### Medication information
- Current medications: Metformin 1000mg twice daily; Empagliflozin 10mg once daily; Semaglutide 1mg once weekly; Sertraline (50 mg daily), Rosuvastatin (10 mg daily), Lisinopril (10 mg daily), Finerenone (10 mg daily)

### Physical exam (current)
Weight 100.5 kg; Height 182.4 cm; BMI 30.2 kg/m²; Blood pressure 138/87 mmHg

### Laboratory values (with date / relative timing)
Format: YYYY-MM-DD value or relative timing (12 months ago / 9 months ago / 6 months ago / 3 months ago / current)
Order: 12 months ago -> 9 months ago -> 6 months ago -> 3 months ago -> current
- Glycemia: HbA1c (12 months ago 8.4%; 9 months ago 8.7%; 6 months ago 9.2%; 3 months ago 9.7%; current 9.5%), FPG (12 months ago 175mg/dL; 9 months ago 241mg/dL; 6 months ago 259mg/dL; 3 months ago 220mg/dL; current 206mg/dL)
- Anthropometrics / blood pressure: Weight (12 months ago 100.2kg; 9 months ago 101.3kg; 6 months ago 98.9kg; 3 months ago 98.1kg; current 100.5kg), Height (12 months ago 182.4cm; 9 months ago 182.4cm; 6 months ago 182.4cm; 3 months ago 182.4cm; current 182.4cm), BMI (12 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 9 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 6 months ago 30.0kg/m²; 3 months ago 29.0kg/m²; current 30.2kg/m²), SBP (12 months ago 140mmHg; 9 months ago 140mmHg; 6 months ago 139mmHg; 3 months ago 138mmHg; current 138mmHg), DBP (12 months ago 84mmHg; 9 months ago 84mmHg; 6 months ago 87mmHg; 3 months ago 84mmHg; current 87mmHg)
- Liver function: ALT (12 months ago 27U/L; 9 months ago 27U/L; 6 months ago 20U/L; 3 months ago 19U/L; current 24U/L), AST (12 months ago 32U/L; 9 months ago 25U/L; 6 months ago 32U/L; 3 months ago 24U/L; current 29U/L), Total Bilirubin (12 months ago 1.3mg/dL; 9 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 6 months ago 1.2mg/dL; 3 months ago 1.1mg/dL; current 1.1mg/dL)
- Kidney: eGFR (12 months ago 54mL/min/1.73m²; 9 months ago 57mL/min/1.73m²; 6 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; 3 months ago 52mL/min/1.73m²; current 53mL/min/1.73m²), UACR (12 months ago 153mg/g; 9 months ago 168mg/g; 6 months ago 140mg/g; 3 months ago 198mg/g; current 170mg/g)
- Lipids: LDL (12 months ago 101mg/dL; 9 months ago 96mg/dL; 6 months ago 104mg/dL; 3 months ago 103mg/dL; current 100mg/dL); HDL (12 months ago 35mg/dL; 9 months ago 35mg/dL; 6 months ago 39mg/dL; 3 months ago 36mg/dL; current 37mg/dL); Triglycerides (12 months ago 138mg/dL; 9 months ago 136mg/dL; 6 months ago 121mg/dL; 3 months ago 120mg/dL; current 127mg/dL)
- Hemoglobin: Hemoglobin (12 months ago 14.0g/dL; 9 months ago 13.2g/dL; 6 months ago 13.9g/dL; 3 months ago 13.2g/dL; current 13.4g/dL)
- Additional tests: urine ketone Not measured (Current); fasting C-peptide 0.88 ng/mL (Current)

### Individualized treatment decision factors
Current adherence and self-management: Very poor adherence (estimated <50%); SMBG rarely performed; lifestyle control severely limited.
Financial context: Patient has standard insurance with moderate copays and a monthly medication budget of ≤ KRW 500,000.
